positive: A minimalist, central-composition vector illustration of a whimsical celestial landscape. The scene features interlocking geometric elements: crescent moons, stylized constellations, and flowing nebula patterns forming a harmonious tapestry around a stylized, benevolent celestial animal (like a spirit fox or deer). Use a color palette of deep indigo, cosmic teal, gold metallic accents, and soft lavender. The style should be hyper-detailed line art combined with negative space, evoking a stained-glass mosaic quality. Strong, clean silhouettes with sharp contrast are paramount. The composition must be scalable and impactful when printed on dark fabric. Highly symmetrical, flat graphic design, symmetrical composition, vector illustration, dotwork stippling, clean line art, maximal contrast, perfect symmetry.
negative: blur, grainy, noise, text, watermark, logo, typography, writing, low detail, poorly drawn, mutated, artifacts, ugly, messy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, realistic photo, photographic, depth of field
